title: AMP Datasets and their Harmonization in FAIRplex
body:
This table provides an overview of human tissue and primary cell datasets for AMP AD, AMP CMD, AMP PDRD, and AMP RA/SLE. While this represents the current ecosystem of available data, specific indexing is prioritized based on ongoing stakeholder feedback.

Shown in the table are datasets that were harmonized to generate the data for the genetic studies and gene expression visualizations proof of concept studies, datasets that are slated to be included in the next round of harmonization to be completed summer 2026, and datasets requiring additional evaluation for inclusion.

Inclusion criteria for the harmonization effort are the following: Datasets with whole genome sequencing (WGS), and/or single cell or single nucleus RNA-seq, and/or bulk RNA-seq, and large scale proteomics on cohorts with transcriptomics available. A preference is given to datasets where processed data is available (e.g., variant calls, gene counts), and scRNA-seq data generated on the 10X Genomics platform. Raw data and other platforms will be considered following the next round of harmonization. For more information about harmonization procedures, visit here.

FAIRplex Dataset Table

AMP Project Dataset Name Dataset Description Dataset Focus Data Type Specimen Type More Information FAIRplex Harmonization - WGS FAIRplex Harmonization - bulk RNAseq FAIRplex Harmonization - sc/sn RNAseq FAIRplex Harmonization - Proteomics
AD The Mount Sinai Brain Bank (MSBB) study This study provides genomic, transcriptomic, epigenomic and proteomic data from multiple brain regions of individuals from the Mount Sinai/JJ Peters VA Medical Center Brain Bank collection. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Genomic Variants, Proteomics, Epigenetics Brain View dataset       Data will be include in the next round of harmonization
AD The Accelerating Medicines Partnership Alzheimer's Disease Diverse Cohorts Study (AMP-AD_DiverseCohorts) The AMP-AD Diverse Cohorts Study is a cross-consortium project generating harmonized datasets from diverse human cohorts. This study provides post-mortem whole genome sequencing, brain bulk RNA sequencing, TMT proteomics data, and single-nucelus multiomic data from over 850 individuals, including 305 Black or African American individuals and 336 Hispanic individuals representing the spectrum of Alzheimer’s Disease phenotypes. Alzheimer's disease Genomic Variants, Gene Expression, Proteomics, Epigenetics, Metabolomics Brain View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization Data completed as part of the proof of concept study Data will be include in the next round of harmonization
AD The Mayo RNAseq Study (MayoRNAseq) This study provides genomic, transcriptomic, proteomic, and metabolomic data from the cerebellum and temporal cortex from individuals from the Mayo Clinic Brain Bank and Banner Sun Health Research Institute. Alzheimer's disease, Progressive Supranuclear Palsy, Pathological Aging Gene Expression, Genomic Variants, Proteomics, Metabolomics Brain View dataset       Data will be include in the next round of harmonization
AD The Religious Orders Study and Memory and Aging Project (ROSMAP) Study This study provides genomics, transcriptomic, epigenetic, proteomic, and metabolomic data on individuals as part of the Religious Orders Study (ROS) and the Memory and Aging Project (MAP) enrolled by the Rush Alzheimer's Disease Center. Alzheimer's disease Genomic Variants, Gene Expression, Epigenetics, Metabolomics, Proteomics Brain, Blood View dataset     Data completed as part of the proof of concept study Data will be include in the next round of harmonization
AD The RNAseq Harmonization Study (RNAseq Harmonization) This study is a release of RNA sequencing data from the ROSMAP, MSBB, and MayoRNAseq studies that has been processed using a common workflow. The study is an extension of the rnaSeqReprocessing study, and has data from donors that are also part of the WGS_Harmonization study. RNAseq data in this study has been aligned to the GRCh38 reference genome. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Analysis Brain View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
AD The Fresh Microglia Regulome (FreshMicro) Study This study provides RNAseq, ATACseq, HiC, and SNP array data on microglia isolated from fresh autopsy and biopsy specimens taken from individuals in the ROSMAP cohort, the Mount Sinai/JJ Peters VA Medical Center NIH Brain and Tissue Repository, and the Living Brain Project. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Epigenetics, Genomic Variants Brain View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative University of Hawaii Gut Metabolites (ADMC_ADNI_UHawaiiGutMetabolites) Study This study provides data on gut microbial metabolites, including bile acids, from serum samples taken from participants in the ADNI 1, GO, and 2 human cohorts. Quantitative measurement of these samples was carried out using ultra-performance liquid chromatography coupled to tandem mass spectrometry at the University of Hawaii. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Blood View dataset        
AD ASU's Chang Lab Nominated Targets for Agora This study provides details about analyses performed by the Chang lab at University of Arizona that led to a set of nominated targets in Agora. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD Brain Viral Profiling in the Mayo, MSBB, and ROSMAP Cohorts (VirusResilience_Mayo.MSBB.ROSMAP) This study provides uniformly processed mitochondrial genome variant calls based on whole genome sequencing data from 1881 individuals profiled through the ROSMAP, MSBB, and MayoRNAseq studies. Alzheimer's disease Genomic Variants Brain View dataset        
AD The Targeted Bisulfite-Seq on 150 Randomly Selected ROSMAP Samples (ROSMAP_bsSeq) Study This study provides targeted bisulfite sequencing data from brain tissue obtained from 150 randomly selected participants from the ROSMAP cohort, and the results of Expression Wide Association Study (EWAS) analyses between expression data and six AD-related traits. Alzheimer's disease Epigenetics, Analysis Brain View dataset        
AD The Mitochondrial DNA in Aging and AD (mtDNA_AD) Study This study provides mitochondrial DNA variants and mtDNA copy number estimates generated using whole genome sequencing data obtained from multiple brain tissues as part of the ROSMAP, MayoRNASeq, and MSBB studies. Alzheimer's disease Genomic Variants Brain View dataset        
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative Baker Heart Targeted Lipidomics (ADMC_ADNI_BakerLipidomics) Study This study provides metabolomics data on serum from the ADNI 1, GO, and 2 cohorts using the Baker Lipidomics platform. The data was generated from samples collected at the baseline visit. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Blood View dataset        
AD The eQTL meta-analysis (eQTLmetaAnalysis) Study This study provides expression quantitative trait loci (eQTL) results across the MayoRNAseq, ROSMAP, and CommonMindConsortium cohorts. Alzheimer's disease Analysis Brain View dataset        
AD The Global quantitative analysis of the human brain proteome in AD and PD (QuantBrainProteome_AD.PD) Study This study provides proteomics data from the frontal cortex and anterior cingulate cortex from individuals from the Emory Alzheimer’s Disease Research Center Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The human brain immunity scRNAseq (HBI_scRNAseq) study This study procides single cell transcriptomic data for brain and blood samples for patients covering several neurological diseases. Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson disease Gene Expression Brain, Blood View dataset     Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Alzheimer’s Disease Neuroimaging Initiative Nightingale NMR (ADMC_ADNI_NightingaleNMR) Study This study provides longitudinal metabolomics data generated on the Nightingale Health Platform from serum from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative - 1, GO, and 2 cohorts. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Blood View dataset        
AD The Whole Genome Sequence Harmonization Study (WGS_Harmonization) This study provides a set of harmonized WGS data generated from the three primary AMP-AD cohort studies: ROSMAP, MSBB, and MayoRNAseq. Alzheimer's disease Genomic Variants Brain View dataset Data from 561 individuals with AD was included in the proof of concept study. The complete dataset will be included in the next round of harmonization      
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Longitudinal Alzheimer’s Disease Neuroimaging Initiative Q500 Biocrates Metabolites (ADMCLongitudinalADNIQ500Biocrates) Study This study provides measurements of the levels of selected metabolites in 4891 human serum samples (2603 for ADNI-1, 2288 for ADNI-GO/2) using the Biocrates MxP® Quant 500 kit. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Serum View dataset        
AD The Development of a Human Microglia-specific CITE-Seq Panel Study The mCITE-Seq Study developed a CITE-Seq (CITE = Cellular Indexing of transcriptomes and epitopes) panel for cell-surface proteome and transcriptome profiles of single human microglia. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The Immunoprofiling of PBMCs from the WHICAP cohort Study Cytometric data and bulk RNAseq profiles of peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMC) from older individuals. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Immunoassay Blood View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
AD The AD CSF Proteome in 300 Emory Individuals and Longitudinally Paired MCI Drug Trial Participants Study (Emory_Levey_300_CSF_FNIH) This study provides a proteomic network analysis of Alzheimer’s Disease cerebrospinal fluid. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The Cell-cell Signaling Drives a Pathologic Astrocytic State Linked to Cognitive Decline in Alzheimer’s Study (Ast10_Communication) This study investigates the cell-cell signaling interactions underlying an astrocytic state that is associated with cognitive decline in Alzheimer’s disease. System-wide computational analyses were conducted on multiple existing human omics datasets spanning various modalities, along with the generation of new datasets for experimental validation. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Proteomics, Immunoassay Brain View dataset        
AD The Investigation of T Cell-induced Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease Study (T Cell_AD) This study investigates T cell frequencies in different human brain regions affected by AD across disease stages and their phenotypes in AD brains. Alzheimer's disease Phenotype Brain View dataset        
AD The CUIMC2 Multiome snRNA/snATAC Study (CUIMC2_Mult) The Columbia University Medical Center’s single nucleus multiomic cohort (CUIMC2_Mult) consisted of 240 participants from the Religious Orders Study and Memory Aging Project (ROSMAP), which is a longitudinal clinical-pathologic cohort of aging and Alzheimer’s disease with participants from two prospective studies of The Religious Order Study (ROS) (N=96) and the Memory and Aging Project (MAP) (N=144). Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset     Data will be included in the next round of harmonization  
AD The Diverse Cohorts Harmonization Study (DivCo_HS) This study presents reprocessed dataset from the Diverse Cohorts project. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Genomic Variants Brain View dataset Data will be included in the next round of harmonization      
AD The AD Knowledge Portal Metadata Harmonization Study (ADKP_Harmonization_Study) This study presents a set of harmonized metadata from various AMP-AD studies. Alzheimer's disease Harmonized Metadata   View dataset        
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Longitudinal Alzheimer’s Disease Neuroimaging Initiative Metabolon (ADMCLongitudinalADNIMetabolon) Study This study seeks to understand the metabolomics of cognitive decline in the ADNI 1 and ADNI GO/2 Cohorts. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Blood, Plasma View dataset        
AD The ROSMAP GAGE-seq study (ROSMAP_GAGE-seq) This study provides GAGE-seq (snHi-C and snRNA-seq) and spatial transcriptomics (Xenium PRIME 5K) of postmortem brain tissue from donors from the Religious Orders Study (ROS) and the Rush Memory and Aging Project (MAP) (collectively known as ROSMAP), longitudinal cohort studies of aging and dementia. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Epigenetics Brain View dataset        
AD The Mount Sinai Brain Bank Array Tissue Panel Study (MSBB_ArrayTissuePanel) This study provides transcriptiptomics data from 19 brain regions from individuals from the Mount Sinai/JJ Peters VA Medical Center Brain Bank collection. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD The Adult Changes in Thought (ACT) Study This study provides proteomic data from the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex from individsuals part of the Adult Changes In Thought (ACT) cohort. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Alzheimers Disease Neuroimaging Initiative 2-GO (ADMC_ADNI2-GO) Study This study provides metabolomics data generated on multiple platforms from serum from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative - GO, 2 cohort. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Blood View dataset        
AD The Alzheimer's Disease Metabolomics Consortium Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative 1 (ADMC_ADNI1) Study This study provides metabolomics data generated on multiple platforms from serum from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative - 1 cohort. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Blood View dataset        
AD The Baltimore Longitudinal Study on Aging (BLSA) Study This study provides proteomics data from the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex and precuneus from individuals from the Baltimore Longitudinal Study on Aging study. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The Banner Sun Health Research Institute (Banner) Study This study provides proteomic data on individuals from the Banner Sun Health Research Institute's Brain and Body Donation Program. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The Broad MDMi (BroadMDMi) Study The study provides transcriptomic data from monocytes taken from 5 healthy human subjects and differentiated into macrophages and microglia-like cells using polarizing cytokines. No Cognitive Impairment Gene Expression Primary Cells View dataset   Data will be included in the next round of harmonization    
AD The Emory Alzheimer's Disease Research Center Brain Bank (Emory_ADRC) Study This study provides proteomics data from the middle frontal gyrus on individuals from the Emory Alzheimer's Disease Research Center collection. Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson disease, Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The Harvard Brain Tissue Resource Center (HBTRC) Study This study provides transcriptomic and genomic data from the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex from individuals from the Harvard Brain Tissue Research Center. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Genomic Variants Brain View dataset        
AD The Mayo Clinic LOAD Genome-Wide Association and Brain Gene Expression Study (MayoLOADGWAS) This study provides genomic data from individuals from the Mayo Clinic Jacksonville and Mayo Clinic Rochester cohorts. Alzheimer's disease Genomic Variants Brain View dataset        
AD The Mayo Pilot RNAseq Study (MayoPilotRNAseq) This study provides transcriptomic data from the temporal cortex of individuals part of the Mayo Clinic brain bank cohort Alzheimer's disease, Progressive Supranuclear Palsy Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD The MayoeGWAS Study (MayoeGWAS) This study provides transcrptomics data and eQTL analysis results on individuals from the Mayo Clinic brain bank cohort Alzheimer's disease, Progressive Supranuclear Palsy, Lewy Body Dementia, Corticobasal Degeneration Disorder, Frontotemporal Dementia, Multiple System Atrophy, Vascular Dementia Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD The Neurodegeneration Pseudotime (DiseasePseudotime) Study This study applied manifold learning to RNAseq data to define an estimate of molecular disease stage Alzheimer's disease Analysis Brain View dataset        
AD The Perelman School of Medicine UPenn Proteomics pilot (UPennPilot) study This pilot study provides proteomic data from brain tissue obtained from the autopsy collections of the University of Pennsylvania School of Medicine Brain Bank. No Cognitive Impairment, Frontotemporal Dementia Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The RNAseq Harmonization Study (rnaSeqReprocessing) This study provides a set of harmonized transcriptomic data generated from the three primary AMP-AD cohort studies: ROSMAP, MSBB, and MayoRNAseq. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD The Perelman School of Medicine UPenn Proteomics (UPP) study This study provides proteomics data from brain tissue obtained from the autopsy collections of the University of Pennsylvania School of Medicine Brain Bank. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD The collaborative St. Jude - Banner Sun Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (StJude_BannerSun) This study provides proteomics data on brain tissue, serum, and cerebrospinal fluid obtained from donor tissue from the Banner Sun Health Research Institute. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD Agora Data Processing This study provides details about analyses that were performed to generate the data for the Agora results visualizer. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression, Proteomics, Metabolomics Brain View dataset        
AD Broad-Rush-Columbia Nominated Targets for Agora This study provides details about analyses performed by the Broad-Rush-Columbia AMP-AD team that led to a set of nominated targets in Agora. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD Duke Nominated Targets for Agora This study provides details about analyses performed by the Duke AMP-AD team that led to a set of nominated targets in Agora. Alzheimer's disease Metabolomics Brain View dataset        
AD Emory Nominated Targets for Agora This study provides details about analyses performed by the Emory AMP-AD team that led to a set of nominated targets in Agora. Alzheimer's disease Proteomics Brain View dataset        
AD MSSM Nominated Targets for Agora This study provides details about analyses performed by the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai AMP-AD team that led to a set of nominated targets in Agora. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD Mayo-UFL-ISB Nominated Targets for Agora This study provides details about analyses performed by the Mayo-UFL-ISB AMP-AD team that led to a set of nominated targets in Agora. Alzheimer's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD The RNAseq Sample Swap Study (rnaSeqSampleSwap) This study provides transcriptomic data from a samplw swap analysis done to identify technical artifacts across RNAseq datasets from the ROSMAP, MSBB, and Mayo RNAseq studies. No Cognitive Impairment Gene Expression Brain View dataset        
AD The Transcriptome-Wide Association Study (TWAS) in Alzheimer's Disease This study provides transcriptome-wide association study results across the MayoRNAseq, MSBB, and ROSMAP cohorts. Alzheimer's disease Analysis Brain View dataset        
CMD Bulk RNAseq dataset from CMDGA     Gene Expression Multiple tissues and primary cells View dataset   Data will be included in the next round of harmonization    
CMD Single cell RNAseq dataset from CMDGA     Gene Expression Multiple tissues and primary cells View dataset     Data from Liver, Adipose, Kidney, Hypothalamus, and Muscle was included in the proof of concept. Data from additional tissues and primary cells will be included in the next round of harmonization  
PDRD amp-pd-clinical-metadata-tier1 Tier-1 sample inventory, clinical forms data, and summary data that pertain to a release Parkinson's disease Clinical   View dataset        
PDRD amp-pd-clinical-metadata-tier2 Tier-2 sample metadata, GCS file references, and analysis tables that pertain to a release Parkinson's disease Clinical   View dataset        
PDRD amp-pd-genomics-WB-DWGS Whole Blood Tissue, DNA whole genome sequence samples and joint called VCFs Parkinson's disease Genomic Variants Blood View dataset Data from 2542 individuals with PD was included in the proof of concept study. The complete dataset will be included in the next round of harmonization      
PDRD amp-pd-genomics-BR-DSNWGS Brain Tissue (multiple regions), DNA Single Nucleus WGS Parkinson's disease Genomic Variants Brain View dataset Data will be included in the next round of harmonization      
PDRD amp-pd-transcriptomics-BR-RSNSR Brain Tissue (multiple regions), RNA Single Nucleus Short Read Parkinson's disease Gene Expression Brain View dataset     Data will be include in the next round of harmonization  
PDRD amp-pd-transcriptomics-WB-RWTS Whole Blood Tissue, RNA Whole Transcriptome Sequence and RWTS Pools Parkinson's disease Gene Expression Blood View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
PDRD amp-pd-transcriptomics-CSF-REBR CSF Tissue, RNA Extracellular Bulk Read, Version Gencode LNCipedia, Version Gencode 29 Parkinson's disease Gene Expression Cerebrospinal fluid View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
PDRD amp-pd-transcriptomics-PLA-REBR Plasma Tissue, RNA Extracellular Bulk Read, Version Gencode LNCipedia, Version Gencode 29 Parkinson's disease Gene Expression Blood View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
PDRD amp-pd-transcriptomics-PLA-RESR Plasma Tissue, RNA Extracellular Short Read Parkinson's disease Gene Expression Blood View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
PDRD amp-pd-proteomics-CSF-PDIA CSF Tissue, Proteomics Data Independent Acquisition, Native and Depleted, Samples and Aggregates Parkinson's disease Proteomics Cerebrospinal fluid View dataset       Data will be include in the next round of harmonization
RA/SLE AMP RA.SLE Genomic Variants v1 SNP array profiling of AMP RA/SLE RA, SLE, OA, RA at-risk, and control subjects, v1 dataset first included in ARK 1.0 Release. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Osteoarthritis, At-Risk Rheumatoid Arthritis, Control Genomic Variants Blood View dataset        
RA/SLE AMP SLE CEL-Seq2 AMP SLE Phase I CEL-Seq2 scRNA-seq data on kidney and urine from SLE and controls cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Control Gene Expression Kidney View dataset     Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP SLE C1-HT scRNA-Seq AMP SLE Phase I Fluidigm C1 HT scRNA-seq data on kidney and skin from SLE and controls cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Control Gene Expression Kidney, Skin View dataset     Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP RA Immune Repertoire Profiling This dataset includes 10x Genomics 5’ CITE-seq, scRNA-seq, and targeted V(D)J sequencing of synovium and PBMC samples from RA cases. Rheumatoid Arthritis Gene Expression, Multimodal, Proteomics, Immune Repertoire Profiling Synovium, Blood View dataset     Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP RA CEL-Seq2 AMP RA Phase I CEL-Seq2 scRNA-seq data on synovium from RA and OA control cases Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis Gene Expression Synovium View dataset     Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP RA.SLE PhaseII CyTOF AMP RA/SLE Phase II CyTOF of PBMC samples profiling marker panels targeting T cells, B cells, myeloid cells, and NK cells and total leukocyte (TL) samples profiling a marker panel targeting granulocytes. At-Risk Rheumatoid Arthritis, Control, Rheumatoid Arthritis, SLE Cytometry, Proteomics Blood View dataset        
RA/SLE AMP SLE scRNASeq AMP SLE Phase II 10x Genomics scRNA-seq data generated from kidney biopsies from SLE cases and control cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Control Gene Expression Kidney View dataset     Data will be include in the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP SLE snRNASeq AMP SLE Phase II 10x Genomics snRNA-seq data generated from kidney biopsies from SLE and control cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Control Gene Expression Kidney View dataset     Data completed as part of the proof of concept study  
RA/SLE AMP SLE Urine Kiloplex Proteomics AMP SLE Phase I and II Kiloplex Quantibody proteomics of urine samples collected from SLE and control cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Control Proteomics Urine View dataset       Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization
RA/SLE AMP RA Synovium Bulk RNA-seq AMP RA Phase I low-input Smart-Seq2 bulk RNA-seq data of FACs sorted populations of cells from dissociated synovium generated from RA and OA cases. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis Gene Expression Synovium View dataset   Data will be include in the next round of harmonization    
RA/SLE AMP RA.SLE PhaseI CyTOF AMP RA/SLE Phase I CyTOF of PBMC samples profiling marker panels targeting T cells, B cells, and myeloid cells and total leukocyte (TL) samples profiling marker panels targeting TLs and PMN cells. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Osteoarthritis, Control Cytometry, Proteomics Blood View dataset        
RA/SLE AMP SLE LN class II kidney scRNA-seq AMP SLE Phase II 10x Genomics scRNA-seq data generated from kidney biopsies from class II lupus nephritis (i.e. SLE) and control cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, Control Gene Expression Kidney View dataset     Data will be include in the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP RA Phase I Synovium CyTOF AMP RA Phase I CyTOF of dissociated synovium samples from RA and OA cases profiling a 35 parameter synovial marker panel. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis Cytometry, Proteomics Synovium View dataset        
RA/SLE AMP RA.SLE Genomic Variants v2 SNP array profiling of AMP RA/SLE RA, SLE, OA, RA at-risk, and control subjects. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, OA, At-Risk Rheumatoid Arthritis, Control Genomic Variants Blood View dataset        
RA/SLE AMP SLE Phase II Urine scRNA-seq AMP SLE Phase II multiplexed scRNA-seq experiment profiling cells isolated from urine samples collected from SLE cases. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Gene Expression Urine View dataset     Data completed as part of the proof of concept study  
RA/SLE AMP RA Phase II Synovium Flow Cytometry AMP RA Phase II flow cytometry profiling of 20 disaggregated synovium samples from 5 OA and 15 RA cases Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis Cytometry, Proteomics Synovium View dataset        
RA/SLE AMP RA Phase II Synovium CITE-seq AMP RA Phase II 10x Genomics 3' CITE-seq profiling of 85 disaggregated synovium samples from 82 rheumatoid arthritis and osteoarthritis cases. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis Gene Expression, Proteomics, Multimodal Synovium View dataset     Data will be considered for inclusion following the next round of harmonization  
RA/SLE AMP RA Phase II Synovium snATAC-seq AMP RA Phase II unimodal 10x Genomics Epi ATAC open chromatin profiling of disaggregated synovium samples from 18 rheumatoid arthritis and osteoarthritis cases. Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis Epigenetics Synovium View dataset
